prematch_flavour.text_en: Annalan Maradona is in the building.
Alanen is warming up his mule kick.

prematch_flavour.text_fi: Mattila tekee maaleja vaikka poskella, jos tilanne vaatii.
prematch_flavour.text_en: Mattila will score with his cheek if that's what it takes.
Kukko finishes with the goal instinct from his youth years.
Taistelutoverit — the original name, the eternal spirit.

prematch_flavour.text_fi: Seura syntyi viimeisenä ilmoittautumisillan, Tampereen Palloliiton sivuilla.
prematch_flavour.text_en: The club was born on the last signup night, on the Tampere Palloliitto website.
Great decisions are made in the sauna.
It all started with one message on MSN Messenger.
The anchor leg fuels up on bulk candy.
The Hornet roars. Time to play.
